/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/core/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/core/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/renderer/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/renderer/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/renderer/Shader.cpp.o -o app -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -framework OpenGL
